items.title: Ethan Thompson (4/4 from deep) and Andrew Nembhard (3/4) have combined for 7 of the 11 made threes in Canada-Puerto Rico so far.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Ethan Thompson (4/4 from deep) and Andrew Nembhard (3/4) have combined for 7 of the 11 made threes in Canada-Puerto Rico so far.

items.title: Ethan Thompson Won't Be With Pacers Summer League Team; Roster Announced
items.author: Sports Illustrated
items.body_excerpt: Ethan Thompson Won't Be With Pacers Summer League Team; Roster Announced Sports Illustrated

items.title: Of note regarding Ethan Thompson's absence from Pacers in summer league is that he's with Puerto Rico for international ball. So, that's noteworthy, but ex-Pacer Enrique Freeman plans to play in both.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Of note regarding Ethan Thompson's absence from Pacers in summer league is that he's with Puerto Rico for international ball. So, that's noteworthy, but ex-Pacer Enrique Freeman plans to play in both.

items.title: Pacers announce their summer league roster. Of note: no Ethan Thompson.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Pacers announce their summer league roster. Of note: no Ethan Thompson.

items.title: Small thing: With Braden Smith heading towards a two-way, Jalen Slawson's offer sheet suggests a battle for two-way slots is coming for the Pacers. Ethan Thompson and Taelon Peter signed two-year two-way deals last year: www.forbes.com/sites/tonyea...
items.author: Tony East
